name: review-squad
description: Multi-perspective Codex review panels for project audits, first impressions, task flows, and polish passes.

interface.shortDescription: Dispatch focused review panels from multiple perspectives.
interface.longDescription: A Codex adaptation of 2389 Research's MIT-licensed Review Squad plugin. Original: https://github.com/2389-research/review-squad. This port provides expert audits, first-impression visitors, task-flow reviewers, and pedantic polish passes using Codex skills, subagents, and Playwright MCP when available.
